en.title: Sales Cloud + Pipeline Reporting for a Commercial Bank
en.tagline: Commercial bankers had their own Excels. After rollout, the weekly pipe review ran off a single Salesforce report.
en.problem: Sales activity lived in each banker's personal spreadsheet. Managers reconciled by hand on Sunday nights. Nobody could answer a pipeline question with confidence in the Monday meeting.
data: Opportunity, Account, Contact — including relationship hierarchies
solution: Defined a pragmatic stage model with exit criteria; validation rules so the stage means the same thing across bankers.
Built Lightning page layouts and required fields that make the data capture painless and non-optional at the same time.
Automated next-step creation via Flow on stage change, and weekly rollup tasks for managers.
Delivered Sales Cloud dashboards for the weekly pipeline review — one page, no exports needed.
en.takeaway: The first value of Salesforce is not analytics — it is a shared conversation between sales and management. Analytics come second.

it.title: Sales Cloud + reporting pipeline per una banca commerciale
it.tagline: I banker avevano ognuno il proprio Excel. Dopo il rollout la pipe review settimanale girava da un singolo report Salesforce.
it.problem: L'attività commerciale viveva nel foglio Excel personale di ciascun banker. I manager riconciliavano a mano la domenica sera. Nessuno rispondeva con sicurezza alle domande del lunedì mattina.
data: Opportunity, Account, Contact — incluse le gerarchie di relazione
Gerarchia team/region per le viste manageriali
solution: Definito uno stage model pragmatico con criteri di uscita; validation rule perché lo stage significhi la stessa cosa tra banker.
Costruiti layout Lightning e required field che rendono la data capture indolore e non opzionale insieme.
Automatizzati i next step via Flow sul cambio stage, e i rollup settimanali per i manager.
Consegnate dashboard Sales Cloud per la pipe review settimanale — una pagina, zero export.
it.takeaway: Il primo valore di Salesforce non è l'analytics — è una conversazione condivisa tra vendite e management. L'analytics viene dopo.
